title: 6 Dinosaurs in Small Bag
features: Travel back in time to 180 million years ago with this set of 6 dinosaurs
Ideal for any little boy, especially one that loves dinosaurs
Children will have hours of fun playing with their dinosaur figures
The set includes dinosaurs such as a stegosaurus, t-rex, brontosaurus and more
description: Product Description 6 Dinosaurs in Small Bag Safety Warning For external use only. Avoid contact with eyes. Keep away from naked flame or direct heat sources.
